TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mikulit tu sakaudip a cacay nu papahÁāļÁĒüŚĎĹÁēęšłÄÁČáś®ĻŤĎČ anu palutatenga ku balucu' idaw aca ku culcl sananay a kawaw, muhalhal haw mangaleb inayay, nika udateng nu maudipay. .umisulitay tu cudad nu amilika ci u.henli, icudanida "sadikuday a cacay nu papah" ilabusa musakau tu kungku, ilabu nu padekuwan, idaw kida amapatayay tu aimelangay namakay sasingalan miadih tu hekal yacacay a kilang, ibalangbangan sa sapapapapah sa mahetik ku papah. .miadih kida imelangay tu kahetik nu papah, uudip mukilu a mangaleb, tu dedemiad cayay kakaph. . sakamusa " anu mahetik tu naming ku papah sa, a mapatay tu kaku sa" idaw kida mikulitay matineng sa, kulit han tu nida kida papah hacacay han pasumilaw pacaiten i ciid nu kilang. sadikuday apapah caay kahetik. Idaw kida maudipay a tina papahan, yaimelangay alawhan maudip. pasubanayi ku wawa nu misuŤęčŚĎäŤ®īšĹ†ÁöĄŚ≠©Ś≠ź: umauduipay kapah nayi ku cacanan, nika laecus nayi ku kaydih. . sisa utademaw maudipay u sabaeketay a niyuci. Idaw ku mahinaay, nikaudip tulitulin sa tu.
S.PHON: mikur~…ĺit tu sakaudip a ¶a ¶aj nu papańß******** anu par~…ĺutat…ôŇča ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° idaw a ¶a ku ¶ur~…ĺ ¶r~…ĺ sananaj a kawaw, muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ ńßaw maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb inajaj, nika udat…ôŇč nu maudipaj. .umisur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad nu amir~…ĺika ¶i u.ńß…ônr~…ĺi, i ¶udanida "sadikudaj a ¶a ¶aj nu papańß" ir~…ĺabusa musakau tu kuŇčku, ir~…ĺabu nu pad…ôkuwan, idaw kida amapatajaj tu aim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj namakaj sasiŇčar~…ĺan miadińß tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ja ¶a ¶aj a kir~…ĺaŇč, ibar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan sa sapapapapańß sa mańß…ôtik ku papańß. .miadińß kida im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu kańß…ôtik nu papańß, uudip mukir~…ĺu a maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb, tu d…ôd…ômiad ¶ajaj kakapńß. . sakamusa " anu mańß…ôtik tu namiŇč ku papańß sa, a mapataj tu kaku sa" idaw kida mikur~…ĺitaj matin…ôŇč sa, kur~…ĺit ńßan tu nida kida papańß ńßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan pasumir~…ĺaw pa ¶ait…ôn i ¶iid nu kir~…ĺaŇč. sadikudaj apapańß ¶aaj kańß…ôtik. idaw kida maudipaj a tina papańßan, jaim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ar~…ĺawńßan maudip. pasubanaji ku wawa nu misu*******: umauduipaj kapańß naji ku ¶a ¶anan, nika r~…ĺa…ô ¶us naji ku kajdińß. . sisa utad…ômaw maudipaj u saba…ôk…ôtaj a niju ¶i. idaw ku mańßinaaj, nikaudip tur~…ĺitur~…ĺin sa tu.
S.FORM: mikulit tu sakaudip a cacay nu papahÁāļÁĒüŚĎĹÁēęšłÄÁČáś®ĻŤĎČ anu palutatenga ku balucu' idaw aca ku culcl sananay a kawaw, muhalhal haw mangaleb inayay, nika udateng nu maudipay. .umisulitay tu cudad nu amilika ci u.henli, icudanida "sadikuday a cacay nu papah" ilabusa musakau tu kungku, ilabu nu padekuwan, idaw kida amapatayay tu aimelangay namakay sasingalan miadih tu hekal yacacay a kilang, ibalangbangan sa sapapapapah sa mahetik ku papah. .miadih kida imelangay tu kahetik nu papah, uudip mukilu a mangaleb, tu dedemiad cayay kakaph. . sakamusa " anu mahetik tu naming ku papah sa, a mapatay tu kaku sa" idaw kida mikulitay matineng sa, kulit han tu nida kida papah hacacay han pasumilaw pacaiten i ciid nu kilang. sadikuday apapah caay kahetik. Idaw kida maudipay a tina papahan, yaimelangay alawhan maudip. pasubanayi ku wawa nu misuŤęčŚĎäŤ®īšĹ†ÁöĄŚ≠©Ś≠ź: umauduipay kapah nayi ku cacanan, nika laecus nayi ku kaydih. . sisa utademaw maudipay u sabaeketay a niyuci. Idaw ku mahinaay, nikaudip tulitulin sa tu.
S.PHON: mikur~…ĺit tu sakaudip a ¶a ¶aj nu papańß******** anu par~…ĺutat…ôŇča ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° idaw a ¶a ku ¶ur~…ĺ ¶r~…ĺ sananaj a kawaw, muńßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ ńßaw maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb inajaj, nika udat…ôŇč nu maudipaj. .umisur~…ĺitaj tu ¶udad nu amir~…ĺika ¶i u.ńß…ônr~…ĺi, i ¶udanida "sadikudaj a ¶a ¶aj nu papańß" ir~…ĺabusa musakau tu kuŇčku, ir~…ĺabu nu pad…ôkuwan, idaw kida amapatajaj tu aim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj namakaj sasiŇčar~…ĺan miadińß tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ja ¶a ¶aj a kir~…ĺaŇč, ibar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan sa sapapapapańß sa mańß…ôtik ku papańß. .miadińß kida im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu kańß…ôtik nu papańß, uudip mukir~…ĺu a maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb, tu d…ôd…ômiad ¶ajaj kakapńß. . sakamusa " anu mańß…ôtik tu namiŇč ku papańß sa, a mapataj tu kaku sa" idaw kida mikur~…ĺitaj matin…ôŇč sa, kur~…ĺit ńßan tu nida kida papańß ńßa ¶a ¶aj ńßan pasumir~…ĺaw pa ¶ait…ôn i ¶iid nu kir~…ĺaŇč. sadikudaj apapańß ¶aaj kańß…ôtik. idaw kida maudipaj a tina papańßan, jaim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ar~…ĺawńßan maudip. pasubanaji ku wawa nu misu*******: umauduipaj kapańß naji ku ¶a ¶anan, nika r~…ĺa…ô ¶us naji ku kajdińß. . sisa utad…ômaw maudipaj u saba…ôk…ôtaj a niju ¶i. idaw ku mańßinaaj, nikaudip tur~…ĺitur~…ĺin sa tu.
